abilities.name: 필터
abilities.description: 효과가 굉장한 기술의 위력을 약하게 한다.

flavorTexts.text: It creates a gas out of poison and minerals from rocks. It then detonates the gas in its cylinders—now numbering eight—to generate energy.
Revavroom viciously threatens others with the sound of its exhaust. It sticks its tongue out from its cylindrical mouth and sprays toxic fluids.
